# requestAssets(completionHandler:)

**Instance Method**

Requests assets for an embedding, if available.

## Declaration

```swift
func requestAssets(completionHandler: @escaping (NLContextualEmbedding.AssetsResult, (any Error)?) -> Void)
```

```swift
func requestAssets() async throws -> NLContextualEmbedding.AssetsResult
```

## Parameters

- **completionHandler**: A completion handler the system calls after it finishes the request.

## Discussion



You use a contextual embedding after loading the necessary assets onto the device. Use [doc://com.apple.naturallanguage/documentation/NaturalLanguage/NLContextualEmbedding/hasAvailableAssets] to determine whether assets are available.

This method returns immediately if the framework knows the state of the assets or if an error occurs.

## Requesting assets

- **NLContextualEmbedding.AssetsResult**: The status of an asset request.
